AboutSection.bio1: Passionate about software development, I have been directing my professional growth toward continuous improvement in programming, code best practices, and system architecture.
AboutSection.bio2: Drawing on my background in infrastructure and systems analysis, I developed a comprehensive view of the application lifecycle. I am transitioning into full-stack development, focusing on Blazor, React, TypeScript, and C# with the goal of becoming a versatile, results-driven developer.

CertificatesSection.subtitulo: Courses and certifications completed throughout my journey.

ContactSection.subtitulo: Ready to build something extraordinary together?
